scene_description:
### Foreground  
- **Road surface**: Dark asphalt with two solid white center lines running down the middle. The left edge of the road has a light-colored gravelly shoulder. A blurred horizontal section at the very bottom center (likely the edge of the capturing vehicle).  

### Midground (Road and Immediate Sides)  
- **Left side of road**:  
  - Dry, golden-brown grassy field extending from the left foreground to the left midground.  
  - A simple wire fence with wooden posts runs parallel to the road, visible from the left midground into the background.  
  - Large, mature trees with dense green foliage (broad leaves) on the far left (left foreground to left midground); the largest tree has a gnarled trunk and extends low to the ground.  
- **Right side of road**:  
  - Dry, brown grassy area with patches of small green shrubs and bushes, extending from the right midground to the right edge.  
- **Vehicles on road**:  
  - A white vehicle (sedan-like) in the center background, positioned on the left lane (facing away from the viewer).  
  - A second vehicle further ahead in the center background, also on the left lane.  

### Background  
- **Road continuation**: The two solid white center lines extend into the distance, indicating a two-lane road.  
- **Terrain and sky**:  
  - A low, dry, grassy hill (barren, with light brown grass) in the center background.  
  - The sky is blue with scattered white clouds.  
- **Infrastructure**:  
  - Two wooden utility poles with crossbars on the right side of the road (background), with multiple power lines (at least two) running between them.  
  - In the far left background, beyond the grassy field, a few small, indistinct structures (too distant to detail).  

### Key Observations (by Category)  
- **TEXT & SIGNS**: No visible text, signs, banners, or stickers.  
- **INFRASTRUCTURE**:  
  - **Fence**: Wire fence with wooden posts along the left side (midground to background).  
  - **Utility poles**: Wooden, with crossbars (background, right side of road); multiple power lines between them.  
  - No bollards, street lamps, traffic lights, fire hydrants, or guardrails visible.  
- **VEHICLES & PLATES**: Two vehicles (white and distant) on the left lane; no visible license plates.  
- **ROAD SURFACE & MARKINGS**: Two solid white center lines; dark asphalt; light-colored gravelly shoulder on the left; left-hand traffic (vehicles on left side of road).  
- **BUILDINGS & ARCHITECTURE**: Small, indistinct structures in the far left background (beyond the field).  
- **VEGETATION & TERRAIN**:  
  - **Left side**: Dense green trees (mature, broad leaves) in the foreground; dry grass.  
  - **Right side**: Dense green shrubs and bushes; dry grass.  
  - **Background**: Low, dry, grassy hill; open sky with clouds.

details.name: white center lines
details.reason: White center lines help distinguish between regions that use white versus yellow road markings.
details.focused_description: Two parallel white lines running along the center of the road. The lines are white in color, made of road marking paint, and appear as straight, continuous stripes on the asphalt surface. No text is visible on the lines.

details.name: wooden utility poles
details.reason: The presence and design of crossbars on wooden poles can indicate specific regional infrastructure.
details.focused_description: A tall, cylindrical wooden utility pole with a weathered dark brown/grayish color. It features horizontal cross-arms at the top, made of the same wooden material. The pole tapers slightly toward the top and shows signs of weathering. No visible text or markings are present on the pole.
